{{Infobox madra
| name = King’s Key madra
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[King]]'s Key is a specialized path of [[madra]] utilized by [[Reigan Shen]], [[the Emperor]] of Lions. This power allows a master to manifest various defensive and offensive capabilities, including the creation of barriers, razor-edged blades, and specialized grips to immobilize opponents. A primary function of this [[madra]] is the ability to tear open space, which can be used to create portals. While many believe its most efficient use is opening access to spatially sealed treasures, it can also be used to summon weapons or creatures from within its portals. Additionally, the [[King]]'s Key [[madra]] can be used to reinforce other objects, such as void keys.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[King’s Key madra]] can tear open space.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[King’s Key madra]] was used in conjunction with the horn to haul [[Lindon]] through space.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon's void key]] was reinforced by [[King’s Key madra]] from [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] uses [[King’s Key madra]] for defense.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[King’s Key madra]] can be burnished gold.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
